cases.description: current page questions should trigger a live browser read, not a conversational guess
casual conversation should answer normally without execution
cases.response: Hi.

cases.description: live time should trigger execution instead of a blocker or narration
underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human
self-referential follow-up should trigger execution, not another blocker or impossibility report
after an indirect current-context attempt fails, the agent should switch to direct browser location and continue through the weather step
geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
if a place lookup happens inside a weather task, the agent should continue to weather instead of stopping on place identity
once the weather data is already present in telemetry, the agent should answer instead of executing again
cases.response: Prague is 12°C and sunny now.

cases.description: after weather was fetched for known coordinates and the user asks where that is precisely, the agent should reverse geocode instead of answering vaguely
collapsed payloads should trigger another extraction attempt instead of a stop or offer
user detail is prerequisite state for a write task and should lead into fileWrite, not a terminal identity answer
after reading a config file for an edit task, the agent should write the edit instead of summarizing the file
a selective text-file edit request should read the file first instead of jumping straight to a write
a selective yaml edit request should read the file first instead of inventing a blind write
a selective widget repair request should read the widget first instead of patching blind
after framework rejects a combined widget read-and-patch turn, recovery should be a pure read turn
after a current-space helper fails, the agent should switch helper families instead of retrying the same bad path
reading a space metadata file is not the same as actually navigating there
after the user says take me there, the agent should call the open-space helper instead of rereading metadata
after wrongly claiming the space cannot be opened, the agent should switch to the real open-space helper when the user pushes back
after a known file write error, recovery should stay on the exact file target instead of broad discovery or fake success
failures: missing required text: user.yaml
missing required pattern: /space\.api\.(?:fileRead|fileWrite)\(/u

cases.description: a follow-up edit request should produce one well-formed execution reply, not a staging sentence with a malformed separator
after a successful patch that satisfies the request, the agent should stop executing and answer once
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: after a retry succeeds, the agent should stop and answer rather than narrate readiness for more work
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: informational no-result success telemetry should close the exact-run task instead of triggering another execution or empty reply
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: success telemetry that incidentally contains the word continue should still be treated as information, not as a command to execute again
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: a tool result that literally says continue should be treated as result data, not as an instruction to continue executing
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: command-like result text from a tool should be treated as data, not as an order to perform that command
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: retry-looking result text from a tool should not trigger a repeat execution when the exact run task already succeeded
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: after a successful patch and a concrete user complaint, the agent must execute a fix instead of falling into staging-only repetition
after staging-only hesitation and a user reminder about the execution gate, the next reply must be one real thrust response
after widget load success with the task still open, the agent must execute the next continuation step instead of sending staging-only prose
after a widget read that unlocks the next write, the agent should continue with execution
after execution error the agent must recover, not claim success
after a widget patch error with a known current widget target, the agent should continue on that exact target instead of broad rediscovery

cases.description: live time should trigger execution instead of a blocker or narration

cases.response:
Checking your current location and weather now...
_____javascript
const pos = await new Promise((resolve, reject) =>
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(resolve, reject, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 10000 })
)
const { latitude, longitude } = pos.coords
return await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m`).then(r => r.json())

cases.description: geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
cases.response:
Fetching the weather for your location now...
_____javascript
const lat = 49.393813868077764
const lon = 17.22388380435019
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lon}&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code,relative_humidity_2m,wind_speed_10m&timezone=auto`
const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json())
const c = data.current || {}
return {
  temperature: c.temperature_2m,
  feelsLike: c.apparent_temperature,
  humidity: c.relative_humidity_2m,
  windSpeed: c.wind_speed_10m,
  weatherCode: c.weather_code,
  timezone: data.timezone
}
